description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a flat, smooth top surface and a solid, dark finish. On the left side, it features a vertical stack of three drawers, each equipped with a metallic handle for easy access. The right side of the desk is supported by a simple, sturdy leg and a solid panel, providing stability and a clean, modern look. The back of the desk is fully enclosed with a solid panel, while the right side view reveals the depth and the flush alignment of the drawers. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for professional or home office environments. The materials and finish suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern, dark-finished office desk with three drawers on the left and a solid, flat work surface. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for work or study.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three drawers with metallic handles on the left and open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, flat top, and the open leg space beneath the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel that fully encloses the desk's rear side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid panel on the right and the side profile of the drawers' handles.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and open leg space, intended for sitting and working; the solid panel is at the back.
